metadata.purpose: SuperAdmin-only admin console for user management and platform statistics. Shows total/active users and allows viewing and deleting users.
metadata.authentication: Required (protected by useSessionGuard and DashboardAccessGate in the dashboard layout)
metadata.authorization: SuperAdmin only; non-SuperAdmin users are redirected to /dashboard

content_sections.title: Admin
content_sections.description: SuperAdmin control panel to inspect user stats (total/active) and manage users (view, delete). Non-SuperAdmin users see an access denied message or are redirected.
